nodes.name: Rebooking webhook
nodes.notes: Triggered by StrydeOS trigger-sequences when a patient hasn't rebooked within 72h of last session.

nodes.name: HEP reminder webhook
nodes.notes: Triggered by StrydeOS trigger-sequences when a patient has an upcoming session and hasn't completed their exercises.

nodes.name: Review prompt webhook
nodes.notes: Triggered by StrydeOS trigger-sequences after patient discharge — requests a Google review.

nodes.name: Build SMS body
nodes.notes: Constructs the SMS message based on the sequence type. Personalised with patient first name and clinic name.

nodes.name: Send SMS via Twilio
nodes.notes:
Sends SMS via Twilio. Requires Twilio credentials configured in n8n.

Env vars:
  TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER — the from number (e.g. +447XXXXXXXXX)

nodes.name: Callback to StrydeOS
nodes.notes: Reports send outcome back to StrydeOS comms_log via /api/n8n/callback.

meta.description:
Handles all three core Pulse SMS sequences: rebooking_prompt, hep_reminder, review_prompt.

Triggered by StrydeOS trigger-sequences.ts via POST to the corresponding webhook path.
Sends SMS via Twilio, then calls back to /api/n8n/callback with the outcome.

Required n8n env vars:
  APP_URL                  — StrydeOS Vercel URL
  N8N_COMMS_WEBHOOK_SECRET — shared auth secret for callback
  TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER      — Twilio from number

Required n8n credentials:
  Twilio API credentials (Account SID + Auth Token)
